agent2: heads up, I already added debug=False/debug_logger params to StreamListener.__init__ (appended after allow_reuse), plus self.debug/self._logger. Also added guarded logging.debug() calls in receive() at: the stream_end/allow_reuse reset block, the cache_hit early-return, the start_identifier-found block, and the rolling-end-check + emit-chunk block near the end. Also added a module-level _truncate_preview() helper and logging import, and instrumented flush(). Please add your idle_timeout_s/tick() changes around/after mine rather than overwriting - happy to share the current file content if useful. I'm done with my edits now, syntax-checked OK.
